title: WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. AND ST. JUDE CHILDREN'S RESEARCH HOSPITAL® PARTNER FOR ANNUAL ST.
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the world's largest digital-first, design-led and sustainable home retailer, announced today, the company's annual participation in the St. Jude Thanks and Giving® campaign benefiting St. Jude Children's Research Hospital®. To date, Williams-Sonoma, Inc. has raised over $66 million for St. Jude in support of the hospital's mission to advance the study and treatment of pediatric cancer and other life-threatening diseases. title: Williams-Sonoma's stock slumps after profit beats expectations but sales miss amid ‘ongoing consumer hesitancy'
text: Shares of Williams-Sonoma Inc. WSM, +2.06% pulled back 1.2% in premarket trading Thursday, after the home goods and furniture retailer beat profit expectations but missed on revenue and cut its full-year outlook, citing “ongoing consumer hesitancy” on high-ticket furniture spend. Net income for the quarter to Oct. 29 slipped to $237.3 million, or $3.66 a share, from $251.7 million, or $3.72 a share, in the same period a year ago.

title: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. announces release date for third quarter 2023 results: Thursday, November 16th, 2023
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) announced today that it will release its third quarter 2023 results on Thursday, November 16th, 2023 before the market opens. Following the release via the wire services, the Company will host a conference call beginning at 10:00 AM Eastern Time, which can be accessed at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will be available at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events beginning at 12.

title: POTTERY BARN TEEN ANNOUNCES HOME FURNISHINGS COLLABORATION WITH THE ICONIC SUPER MARIO™ FRANCHISE
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pottery Barn Teen, a portfolio brand of Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the world's largest digital-first, design-led and sustainable home retailer, today announces the brand's debut collection inspired by the world of Super Mario™. The Super Mario Collection includes cozy bedding, backpacks and lunch accessories, and décor featuring icons and power-ups from the video games. The full collection is now available exclusively at Pottery Barn Teen. Designed to del.
